ham.subject: Your XYZ SaaS Subscription Renewal - Action Needed
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are enjoying the full features of XYZ SaaS. This is a friendly reminder that your current subscription plan will renew on 15th May 2026. Your subscription will automatically renew for another 12 months at the same rate of ₹9,999 per month.

To ensure uninterrupted service, please confirm your payment details or update your billing information by visiting the dashboard at <URL>.

If you wish to change your plan or cancel, simply click on "Manage Subscription" in the dashboard before the renewal date.

Thank you for choosing XYZ SaaS. We look forward to serving you for another year.

Best regards,
XYZ SaaS Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your IT Ticket #12345 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hi Team,

I am writing to you regarding the IT helpdesk ticket #12345 that was opened yesterday for the "Server Access Issue" on the internal portal. According to the ticket details, the server credentials sent via email are no longer valid, and you need to reset your password immediately.

Please click on the link below to reset your password and verify your identity. This action is mandatory to restore access to the internal resources and to avoid any security breach.

Reset Password: <URL>

Once you have completed the reset, kindly reply to this email with the confirmation code. Failure to comply may result in temporary suspension of your access rights.

Thanks for your prompt attention.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
